title: H-A2 one-day independent-validation import and diagnostic preregistration
purpose: Pre-register the local import, normalization, and data-availability diagnostic for the already-downloaded 2025-04-08 high-VIX independent-validation sample before parsing DBN, reconstructing the 09:35 signal, checking candidate-trade quote availability, running exact replay, or making any edge claim.
source_download_summary: H-A2.40 downloaded/cache-confirmed 15 Databento requests for 2025-04-08, totaling 54,014,593 bytes at logged estimate $0.504662. This is E0 data-acquisition evidence only.

allowed_inputs.use: control the exact raw files, request count, cost trace, and forbidden claims
confirm the one-day scope and locked H-A2 guardrails
preserve cost traceability; not used for additional downloads
read only after this preregistration passes to build local normalized diagnostic artifacts
confirm the high-VIX regime label for 2025-04-08 without provider calls
confirm same-day macro labels without provider calls

forbidden_inputs.reason: This step must use only the already-downloaded one-day sample.
Provider changes remain outside this diagnostic step.
IBKR remains a separate externally blocked data path and is not needed for the downloaded 2025-04-08 SPY bars.
H-L1 remains blocked until real timestamp-clean news cases exist.
News capture remains blocked by its own cooldown/upstream response gate.
The diagnostic must not become an OOS tuning pass.

planned_steps.description: Inventory the 15 raw files, byte counts, sha256 values, datasets, schemas, UTC windows, and field groups against the H-A2.40 download result.
planned_steps.verification: All expected raw files exist, have positive size, match the request count, and preserve the source download metadata.

planned_steps.description: Parse only the downloaded EQUS.MINI SPY ohlcv-1m regular-session file and normalize UTC/ET timestamps for 2025-04-08.
planned_steps.verification: Normalized SPY bars cover the regular session around 09:30-16:00 ET and include the 09:35 decision context.

planned_steps.description: Parse only the downloaded OPRA.PILLAR cbbo-1m SPY.OPT windows and normalize symbols, timestamps, bid, ask, and mid fields.
planned_steps.verification: Normalized quote inventory reports row counts by window and field group, including entry, intraday checks, and 15:45 forced-close window.

planned_steps.description: Check UTC-to-ET conversion, same-day 0DTE expiry handling, and no use of information after 09:35 for the candidate signal.
planned_steps.verification: Diagnostic report flags any missing or late timestamp dependency before any candidate-trade decision.

planned_steps.description: Reconstruct only the locked 09:35 H-A2 condition using clean macro/VIX labels plus proxy_5m_followthrough threshold 0.001.
planned_steps.verification: Report states whether the locked signal would be true or false for 2025-04-08, without changing threshold or adding a filter.

planned_steps.description: If the locked signal is true, check whether entry and exit quote windows contain auditable bid/ask data for candidate option selection and forced close.
planned_steps.verification: Report classifies data availability as candidate_trade_data_ready, candidate_trade_data_blocked, or no_candidate_trade_signal.

planned_steps.description: Write a local diagnostic summary and Markdown report with E1-or-lower claims only.
planned_steps.verification: Validator confirms no exact replay, no PnL acceptance, no paper-trading approval, and no E2 claim.

allowed_claims: H-A2 has a pre-registered local import/normalization/diagnostic plan for the 2025-04-08 one-day independent-validation sample.
The next step may parse only the already-downloaded raw DBN files and local regime labels.
The diagnostic may report raw-file inventory, timestamp alignment, locked-signal reconstruction, and quote availability.
The plan preserves the locked 09:35-only H-A2 signal and threshold 0.001.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim H-A2 edge is validated.
Do not claim E2 acceptance-grade evidence.
Do not run exact replay directly from this preregistration.
Do not compute or report acceptance-grade strategy PnL from this preregistration.
Do not download more validation packs.
Do not add a new OOS-selected filter.
Do not treat import diagnostics as validation evidence.
completion_criteria: The preregistration names the 2025-04-08 one-day sample and source download result.
The preregistration names raw-file inventory, SPY bar import, OPRA quote import, timestamp alignment, signal reconstruction, and quote-availability checks.
The preregistration preserves the 09:35-only signal and threshold 0.001.
The preregistration allows only local raw parsing after validation and forbids new downloads, exact replay, paper trading, and E2 claims.
tier_blockers: No import/normalization diagnostic has run yet
No independent validation PnL day has been computed
